articles.title: What is over-parenting? 4 signs you might be doing it without realising
articles.description: What starts as concern can slowly turn into constant intervention, decision-making, and rescue. Children may still look cared for, but they may also begin to lose space to think, fail, and grow on their own. The signs are often subtle, and that is exactly what makes them so easy to miss in everyday family life today.

articles.title: Bengaluru man left dream job to start a falooda shop in Tamil Nadu. Today, he's the owner of a Rs 9 crore brand
articles.description: Leaving a secure corporate role, Bengaluru techie Pradeep Kannan launched a modest ice cream shop in Karur. Facing initial skepticism, he meticulously refined recipes and focused on quality. Years of dedication transformed the small venture into a thriving brand with over 18 outlets in India and Dubai, now valued at ₹9 crore, showcasing a remarkable entrepreneurial journey.

articles.title: Not overworked or burnt out. New hire quits in a week saying he was 'exhausted'. Manager was left surprised. Why?
articles.description: A new employee quit a job within a week, not due to heavy workload, but a lack of it. This story highlights how prolonged idleness can be mentally exhausting. The absence of meaningful tasks led to stagnation and drained energy. Professionals need purpose and engagement to feel fulfilled. This challenges the common assumption that only overwork causes burnout.
